title: Bitcoin and ethereum prices today, Friday, May 1, 2026: Prices moving higher this morning
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: As of 7:17 a.m. ET, Bitcoin was $77,376.65 and Ethereum was $2,284.34. By 9:15 a.m. ET, Bitcoin reached $78,178.28 and Ethereum $2,308.85.

At 9:15 a.m. Eastern Time today, the market price for a single Bitcoin (BTC) is $78,178.28. That's a $1,861.84 jump from where it was
